---
title: "Mergin Maps Admin Essentials"
subtitle: "A Tutorial"
author: "Hans van der Kwast, Ryan Aherin"
date: "2026-04-10"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
---

{{< include Creating_a_Project_in_QGIS.qmd >}}
{{< include Field_Data_Collection.qmd >}}
{{< include Dashboard.qmd >}}
{{< include User_Management.qmd >}}
{{< include Collaborative_Mapping.qmd >}}
{{< include Manage_Conflicts.qmd >}}
{{< include Good_Practices.qmd >}}
